error_signature: Can’t determine which item to use - execute node for more info
title: Error determining which item to use in workflow
symptom: The workflow throws an error stating 'Can’t determine which item to use - execute node for more info' when trying to reference data from a previous node.
applies_when: Using nodes that output multiple items
not_this_if: No branching or merging in the workflow
root_cause: This error occurs when n8n cannot determine which specific item to reference due to the complexity of the workflow, such as branching or merging nodes that output multiple items, leading to ambiguity in item tracking.
fix_steps: Identify the node that is causing the ambiguity
Instead of using `.item`, use `.first()`, `.last()`, or `.all()[index]` to specify the item
Update the expression to reference the desired item explicitly
agent_instruction: Modify the item referencing method in your workflow to use explicit item selection.
